---
title: "Integration of full cerebellum"
---

Code for UMAPs of each individual dataset and the full cerebellulm. Note that the code chunks are run interactively using the `scrnaseq_env` conda environment. This file was **not** rendered with `quarto render`.

## Initialization

Packages:

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(Seurat)
```

Functions/files/directories:

```{r}
thesis_dir <- "../../"
source(file.path(thesis_dir, "./utils.R"))

out_dir <- "./integ_full"
my_pals <- get_custom_pals()
```


## UMAPs of individual datasets

```{r}
# load Seurat objects for individual datasets
srat_qs <- get_srat_paths()
srat_list <- load_srat(srat_qs[c("aldinger_human", "sepp_human", "vladoiu_mouse", "sepp_mouse")])
```

```{r}
# get all common cell types and set as factor levels
common_cell_types <- map(
  .x = srat_list,
  .f = \(srat) {unique(srat$common_cell_name)}
) %>%
  list_c() %>%
  unique() %>%
  purrr::discard(.p = is.na) %>%
  sort()

srat_list <- map(
  .x = srat_list,
  .f = \(srat) {
    srat$common_cell_name <- factor(
      srat$common_cell_name,
      levels = common_cell_types
    )
    return(srat)
  }
)
```

```{r}
# plot UMAPs for each individual dataset
indiv_umaps <- map2(
  .x = srat_list,
  .y = names(srat_list),
  .f = \(srat, dataset) {
    plt_title <- str_to_sentence(dataset) %>%
      str_replace(pattern = "_([:alpha:]+)", replacement = " (\\1)")

    .plt <- DimPlot(
      srat,
      reduction = "umap",
      group.by = "common_cell_name",
      label = TRUE,
      label.size = 3,
      repel = TRUE,
      raster = FALSE
    ) + 
      labs(title = plt_title) + 
      scale_colour_manual(
        drop = FALSE,
        values = scales::pal_hue()(25)
      )
    
    # hacky method so legends can be combined in downstream patchwork (normally
    # you'd set `geom_point(show.legend = TRUE)`, but this not available with
    # `DimPlot`); also need to deal with NA
    .plt[[1]]$layers[[1]]$show.legend <- TRUE
    .plt[[1]]$data$common_cell_name <- addNA(.plt[[1]]$data$common_cell_name)

    ggsave(
      filename = paste0(dataset, "_umap.png"),
      plot = .plt,
      path = out_dir,
      width = 10,
      height = 5,
      units = "in"
    )

    return(.plt)
  }
)
```

```{r}
# free up some RAM
rm(srat_list)
```


## UMAP of full cerebellum integration

```{r}
# load Seurat object for integrated dataset
integ_srat <- load_srat(srat_qs["full"]) %>%
  pluck("full")
```

```{r}
# plot UMAP by cell type
full_umap <- DimPlot(
  integ_srat,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "common_cell_name",
  label = TRUE,
  label.size = 3,
  repel = TRUE,
  raster = FALSE
) + 
  labs(title = "integrated data")
ggsave(
  filename = "integ_full_cell_type.png",
  plot = full_umap,
  path = out_dir,
  width = 10,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
# plot UMAP by species
full_umap_species <- DimPlot(
  integ_srat,
  reduction = "umap",
  cells.highlight = WhichCells(integ_srat, expression = species == "human"),
  sizes.highlight = 0.01,
  label = FALSE,
  raster = FALSE
) + 
  labs(title = NULL) + 
  scale_colour_manual(
    labels = c("mouse", "human"),
    values = my_pals$species,
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3), nrow = 1)
  ) + 
  theme_classic2() + 
  theme(
    legend.position = "inside",
    legend.position.inside = c(0.05, 0.05),
    legend.justification.inside = c(0, 0)
  )
ggsave(
  filename = "integ_full_species.png",
  plot = full_umap_species,
  path = out_dir,
  width = 5,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```


## Final figure

```{r}
.plt <- indiv_umaps$aldinger_human + 
  indiv_umaps$sepp_human + 
  indiv_umaps$vladoiu_mouse + 
  indiv_umaps$sepp_mouse + 
  full_umap + 
  guide_area() + 
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides = "collect") + 
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") & 
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 10))
walk(
  .x = c("png", "pdf"),
  .f = \(device) {
    ggsave(
      filename = paste("final", device, sep = "."),
      plot = .plt,
      path = out_dir,
      width = 9,
      height = 12,
      units = "in",
      dpi = 600
    )
  }
)
```
